item.title: [Segurança] Threat Actors Probe Gitea Docker Flaw CVE-2026-20896 13 Days After Disclosure
item.description:
🚨 Threat Actors Probe Gitea Docker Flaw CVE-2026-20896 13 Days After Disclosure
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Threat actors have been observed attempting to exploit a recently patched critical security flaw in Gitea Docker images, according to Sysdig. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-20896 (CVSS score: 9.8), a vulnerability that stems from the DevOps platform trusting the "X-WEBAUTH-USER" header from any source IP address, effectively allowing an unauthenticated internet client to get elevated
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/threat-actors-probe-gitea-docker-flaw.html

item.title: [Segurança] BeyondTrust Patches Critical Auth Bypass Flaws in Remote Support and PRA
item.description:
🚨 BeyondTrust Patches Critical Auth Bypass Flaws in Remote Support and PRA
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.2
Resumo:
BeyondTrust has released updates to address two critical security flaws affecting Remote Support (RS) and Privileged Remote Access (PRA) products that, if successfully exploited, could allow unauthenticated attackers to take control of susceptible devices. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-40138 (CVSS score: 9.2) - A pre-authentication vulnerability exists in the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/beyondtrust-patches-critical-auth.html

item.title: [Segurança] Suspected China-Aligned Hackers Exploit Roundcube Flaws Against Universities
item.description:
🚨 Suspected China-Aligned Hackers Exploit Roundcube Flaws Against Universities
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
A suspected China-aligned threat activity cluster has been observed exploiting Roundcube webmail software belonging to physics and engineering departments of U.S. and Canadian universities as part of a new campaign. The activity involves the exploitation of now-patched, critical security flaws in the open-source email solution, such as CVE-2024-42009 (CVSS score: 9.3), to siphon credentials,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/suspected-china-aligned-hackers-exploit.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8502-1: GnuTLS vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8502-1: GnuTLS vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that GnuTLS had a timing side-channel when processing malformed ciphertexts in RSA-PSK ClientKeyExchange. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to recover sensitive information. (CVE-2024-0553) Bing Shi discovered that GnuTLS incorrectly handled decoding certain DER-encoded certificates. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause GnuTLS to consume resources, leading to a deni...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8502-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-53646 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-53646 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
FOSSBilling is a free, open-source billing and client management system. In versions 0.5.6 through 0.7.2, when a `ClientPasswordReset` record already exists for a client (from a previous unexpired reset request), subsequent calls to the `reset_password` guest API endpoint reuse the existing token instead of generating a new one. The 15-minute validity window is anchored to the first request's `created_at` timestamp,...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53646

item.title: [Segurança] AI-Driven Cyberattacks Double Critical Vulnerabilities as Check Point Urges Enterprises to Prioritize Exposure Management - InfotechLead
item.description:
📰 AI-Driven Cyberattacks Double Critical Vulnerabilities as Check Point Urges Enterprises to Prioritize Exposure Management - InfotechLead
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] New Januscape Linux flaw allows VM escape on Intel, AMD devices
item.description:
📰 New Januscape Linux flaw allows VM escape on Intel, AMD devices
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A 16-year-old Linux kernel vulnerability, dubbed Januscape, allows attackers to escape a virtual machine and execute arbitrary code on the host.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/linux/new-januscape-linux-kernel-flaw-allows-vm-escape-on-intel-amd-devices/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Optimize Your On-Prem Reality at VMware Explore 2026
item.description:
📰 Optimize Your On-Prem Reality at VMware Explore 2026
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Join us at Explore Las Vegas, Nevada | The Venetian Aug. 3, 2026 REGISTER NOW Let’s look at the data center floor. If your hardware footprint is growing because you are prioritizing data sovereignty and moving workloads back on-prem, you are not alone. The industry shift toward keeping data local means IT …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/level-up-your-learning-at-explore/
